The lady that owned ​“kabosu” decided to adopt ​a new dog named neiro.

The lady that owned ​“kabosu” decided to adopt ​a new dog named neiro.

Neiro’s name means “the colour of sound” as described in the tweet below by @kabosumama.

Join the FIRST Neiro community on the blockchain and welcome the new Doge to the family.

R.I.P. Kabosu November 2, 2005 – May 24, 2024

Neiro 2024
